creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
According to :

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/ports@freebsd.org.html

The port security/swatch has a distfile that is not downloadable.  The
directory for this distfile has changed, see the patch below.

This patch also removes a MASTER_SITE that doesn't carry the OLD directory.

This port really should be updated to swatch 3.x, perhaps I'll take a crack
at it.

How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/security/swatch && make fetch;
